title: Begin the Secret Operation! Head for the New Yamato!
overview: As the crew of the Yamato settles into their new lives, a mysterious force heads towards Earth.

title: The Silent Invasion! Ginga, Take Up Your Arms!
overview: The invasion begins as the crew of the Yamato race towards a secret destination.

title: Shocking! The Dezarium's Dark Millennium of History
overview: The truth about the Dezarium and their secret past is revealed.

title: Fire the Starting Gun! The New Battleship Yamato Comes To Life
overview: The crew of the Yamato arrives at their destination, with a powerful Dezarium ship not far behind. Can the reborn Yamato stop this new alien threat?

title: Fierce Clash! Destroy the Invisible Battleship!
overview: The Yamato is confronted by a new type of peril: a Dezarium ship that can evade detection by turning itself invisible!

title: Alphon Infiltrates! Get back Sasha!
overview: A Dezarium officer makes a daring raid aboard the Yamato itself, and the crew must muster everything it can to stop him from taking Sasha.

title: The Terrible Orfevre Zone! Yamato, Bet It All on a Surprise Attack!
overview: The Yamato sets course for the Orfevre Zone, a dangerous area filled with collapsed gas giants.

title: Activate the Space Battleship Arizona! Reveal the True Nature of the Dezarium!
overview: Back on Earth, the resistance engages in a daring plan to reveal the true nature of the Dezarium.

title: Friendship Torn Apart! Yamato, Break Through the Subspace Gate at All Costs!
overview: The Dezarium set a clever trap for the Yamato as it enters the subspace gate.

title: The Fierce Attack of the Deusura III! The Terrible Operation Asteroid!
overview: As the Yamato exits the subspace gate, it finds itself under attack by the Gamilas.

title: Sasha, A Reunion Across Time
overview: The crew is reunited with Sasha in an unexpected way.

title: Frulul's Day Off
overview: Frulul learns more about what it means to be human.

title: All Ships, Sortie! Eliminate the Planet Destroyer Missile!
overview: The Yamato attempts to intercept a deadly planet destroyer missile.

title: Enter the Dark Gas Clouds! Chase the Witch of Uralia!
overview: The Yamato dives into a dangerous gas cloud in search of the Witch of Uralia.
